steps.title: Spot the shared location
steps.content: The notes identify both the Kemp's ridley and olive ridley as sea turtles found in the Atlantic Ocean. This geographic similarity is the key fact to emphasize.

steps.title: Match similarity to the answer choices
steps.content:
The correct answer opens with “Both” and states these two species share the Atlantic Ocean.

The other three fail to emphasize similarity:
  • A focuses on only one species
  • B uses “while” to contrast their scientific names
  • D explicitly calls them “different species
.” C is correct.
